apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-summary: Module-ka API-ka ee lagu helayo talooyinka sifooyin dheeraad ah oo lagu daro walaxda Wikibase. Module-kan API-ka waxaa inta badan loogu talagalay inuu isticmaalo widget-ka soo-jeediyaha marka ay isticmaalayaashu wax ka beddelayaan walxaha Wikibase.
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-example-2: Hel talooyinka walaxda Q4 ee u dhaxeeya darajooyinka 10 illaa 15
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-example-3: Hel talooyinka isku darka sifooyinka P21 iyo P31
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-example-4: Hel talooyinka sifooyinka reebban ee loo isticmaalo P21
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-example-5: Hel talooyinka tixraacyada loo isticmaalo P21
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-context: Hadday ahaan lahayd walax, tixraac ama sifo reebban.
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-continue: Barta dhumucda halka laga sii wadi karo raadinta.
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-entity: U soo jeedi sifooyin walaxda la siiyay, iyadoo la raacayo liiska sifooyinka hadda u yaalla walaxdaas.
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-include: Talooyinka lagu darayo: Sida caadiga ah waxaa la soo jeedin doonaa oo keliya sifooyinka la raadin karo (kuwa aan duugoobin, ee aan weli jirin).
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-properti: U soo jeedi sifooyin dheeraad ah liiska sifooyinka la siiyay.
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-size: Caddee tirada talooyinka la rabo in lagu soo celiyo.
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-types: U soo jeedi sifooyin dheeraad ah liiska noocyada la siiyay (qiimayaashani waxay la mid yihiin kuwa lagu ururin lahaa classifyingPropertyIds haddii walax lagu daro wicidda API-ga). Waxaa loo isticmaalaa iyadoo lala kaashanayo halbeegga sifooyinka.
propertysuggester-wbsgetsuggestions-eith: Sii halbeegga aqoonsiga walaxda 'entity' ama liiska sifooyinka 'properties'
apihelp-wbsgetsuggestions-param-event: Aqoonsiga Dhacdada ee loo isticmaalo in lagu midooyo dhacdooyinka laga diiwangeliyay dhanka macmiilka iyo dhanka adeega.
